prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为8361→8499→9046→9715→10681，呈持续后移趋势，5年累计后移约2320名，年均约464名；2025年基准位次约10681名，近3年加速后移（2023→2024后移669名，2024→2025后移966名）；该校在天津招生计划2021–2024年均为55人，2025年增至58人；2026年计划仍为58人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，计划因素对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第53位持续提升至2026年第44位，排名稳步上升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2022年声誉评价为明显负面（安徽、广西投档线断档），2025年为偏负面（全国投档线溃败），2026年为偏负面（以中性舆情事件为主，14条事件中13条中性、1条负面）；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），2021年排名第4（高热），2023年排名第50（较热），整体关注度较高；学科评估文件中未收录郑州大学A-及以上等级学科记录，说明该校无顶尖优势学科；但作为综合性大学，临床医学、化学、材料等学科具有一定实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关专业大类热度：计算机类/电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程为高热推荐，临床医学/口腔医学为推荐，法学为分化观望，新闻传播为明显劝退；本省考生总数2021年54025→2025年71938→2026年82000（不确定标记），2026年较2025年增长约14%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数大幅增加（约14%）导致竞争加剧，以及学校软科排名提升对报考吸引力的正面作用，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准10681名基础上继续后移。考生规模扩大是推高位次数字的主要因素，而学校排名提升和声誉改善有一定抵消作用。预测最低位次约10841名，区间10341–11341名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（主校区）
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）
- 工商管理类（工商管理（商业智能管理）、会计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新闻传播学类（广告学、新闻学、网络与新媒体）
- 英语
- 经济学类（经济学（数智经济）、金融学）
- 公共管理类（行政管理、社会工作、国际政治）
- 马克思主义理论类（思想政治教育、马克思主义理论）
- 自动化类（电气工程及其自动化、自动化）
- 物理学类（物理学、电子科学与技术、测控技术与仪器）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（化学工程与工艺、制药工程、冶金工程）
- 临床医学（省医临床学院）
- 机械类（机械工程、能源与动力工程）
- 化学类（化学、应用化学）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学（碳中和））
- 预防医学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10341–11341名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如10341名以内）可重点冲刺一档的法学、中国语言文学类等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约10841名附近）应以自动化类、电子信息类、经济学类等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（11341名）应优先考虑三档专业保底。注意临床医学、预防医学虽属三档但社会热度较高，实际竞争可能高于位次排序。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 8361 → 8499 → 9046 → 9715 → 10681, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2320 places over 5 years, averaging about 464 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10681, with accelerated backward shifts in the last 3 years (669 places from 2023 to 2024, 966 places from 2024 to 2025); the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin was 55 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 58 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 58, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily improved from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, indicating a steady rise in comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (discontinuities in admission scores in Anhui and Guangxi), in 2025 it was somewhat negative (nationwide admission score collapse), and in 2026 it was somewhat negative (mainly neutral public opinion events, with 13 neutral and 1 negative out of 14 events); Douyin popularity total ranking 8th (high heat), ranking 4th in 2021 (high heat), ranking 50th in 2023 (relatively hot), overall attention is high; the discipline evaluation file does not include records of A- or above level disciplines for Zhengzhou University, indicating no top-tier advantageous disciplines; however, as a comprehensive university, disciplines such as clinical medicine, chemistry, and materials have certain strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of related major categories: computer science/electronic information/communication are highly recommended, electrical engineering is highly recommended, clinical medicine/stomatology are recommended, law is differentiated and wait-and-see, journalism and communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of local candidates in the province was 54025 in 2021 → 71938 in 2025 → 82000 in 2026 (with uncertainty mark), with an increase of about 14% from 2025 to 2026, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of local candidates (about 14%) leading to intensified competition, and the positive effect of the university's improved Soft Science ranking on application attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 10681. The expansion of the candidate pool is the main factor pushing the ranking number higher, while the university's ranking improvement and reputation enhancement have some offsetting effect. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10841, with a range of 10341–11341.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10341–11341, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10341), focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 10841), mainly consider Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Electronic Information, and Economics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (11341), prioritize Tier 3 majors for safety. Note that although Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine are in Tier 3, they have high social popularity, and actual competition may be higher than the ranking suggests.
